assessor_raw: Multimodal pathology classification: methodologically rigorous with site-and-time stratified split, macro-F1 for rare subtype evaluation, image-only baseline with identical architecture, label leakage audit, and comprehensive clinical metrics (ECE, PPV/NPV per rare subtype with CIs). Fusion architecture grid search is appropriate. Sensitivity analysis for rare subtypes is a strong clinical validity check. Scope honestly bounded to studied institutions. Verdict: defense_wins.
